TimeEntry.Title: Email migrationg from Godaddy
TimeEntry.Notes: Followup with Diana and called Deepak as he requested and have some queries so called the godaddy and confirmed with them and updated to Deepak.

TimeEntry.Title: ALG-HQ-LPT-08 : Updated cisco umbrella with latest version 5.1.13.177
TimeEntry.Notes: ALG-HQ-LPT-08: Accessed the machine, removed the old version, installed the latest version, and rescanned the system. The machine was successfully updated in the MyRMM database.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: ALG-HQ-LPT-10 Missing patch while last run
TimeEntry.Notes:
I worked on the Missing patches and logged into the ManageEngine portal to review the approved patches for the machines. I downloaded and manually installed the applicable failed patches, then rebooted . Also scanned the machines. Some patches not applicable due to non compatibility. All previously missing patches were successfully updated.Machines are ALG-HQ-LPT-10

Patches are Inspiron 16 5640 (1.17.0)

RTL8852CE PCIe 802.11ax Wireless Network Controller[PCI\VEN_10EC&DEV_C852] (6001.16.172.0)

Realtek High Definition Audio[INTELAUDIO\FUNC_01&VEN_10EC&DEV_0295] (6.0.9879.1)

TimeEntry.Title: ALG-HQ-LPT-09 offline from 49 days, removed from all the portals
TimeEntry.Notes: ALG-HQ-LPT-09 machine was offline from 49 days, removed it from all the portals.

TimeEntry.Title: Headphone not working
TimeEntry.Notes: Najmeh reported that her headphones were not working. I logged into her system, updated the audio drivers, and ran a device scan to detect the headphones. Once detected, I configured the settings in Microsoft Teams by setting the headphones as both the speaker and microphone. I verified functionality through a Teams test call and additionally tested audio on YouTube. I also advised Najmeh to report future issues via the support email or phone instead of MyRemote chat.

TimeEntry.Title: Preya Patel from ALG called in regarding Camera isssue
TimeEntry.Notes:
Preya Patel from ALG called in regarding Camera isssue..

User said when she tried calling from zoom or teams the Camera is not working...

so connect to the user computer and open the camera app and check the settings found that camera has covered with something..

so asked the user to might be there is a small cover...user removed that its working fine...

hence closing the ticket...

TimeEntry.Title: LEENA,SEAN machines are offline from more than 50 days
TimeEntry.Notes: LEENA,SEAN machines are offline from more than 50 days. So removed the machine from all the Technijian portals and removed from the sheet as well.

TimeEntry.Title: Manage-Engine Latest version updated 11.4.2528.28.W - Smita
TimeEntry.Notes:
As per assigned task by lead, accessed the ManageEngine Endpoint Central admin console and reviewed managed endpoints for outdated agent versions. Filtered computers by Agent Version ≠ Latest, selected the affected machines, and initiated a manual agent upgrade using Agent → Computers → Install / Upgrade Agent → Upgrade Agent. The upgrade was deployed in place over the existing agent without requiring user interaction.
Agent upgrade successfully initiated on selected endpoints. Device is updating to the latest agent version and reporting normally to the Endpoint Central console.
Machine is: Smita

TimeEntry.Title: ALG HQ LPT-13 : Manually patch update as APD failed to do
TimeEntry.Notes: I reviewed the patches and downloaded the Cisco Umbrella, Foxit Reader, and Foxit Editor packages, which were applied successfully. I also updated .NET 6.0.36 and .NET 8.0.22. After completing all updates, I rescanned the PC using MyRMM to verify the patches. All patches were applied successfully and are now reflected in the MyRMM database.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.32.20403.0)updated on machines ALG-HQ-LPT-01,ALG-HQ-LPT-10,ALG-HQ-LPT-13,HAILEY
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login into Crowd strike portal to check the machines with outdated version. Found machines ALG-HQ-LPT-01,ALG-HQ-LPT-10,ALG-HQ-LPT-13,HAILEY
running with older version of crowd strike. So connected to machines and uninstalled the old version  and downloaded and installed the latest sensor version 7.32.20403.0
of CrowdStrike, verified from the portal. it is updated now. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Email Setup
TimeEntry.Notes: Received an email from Sai regarding a new email setup for Penny McNerney. Logged into the GoDaddy admin console and created the email account. After confirming license availability with Diana, assigned a Business Standard license to the new account. Finally, sent the new email address and temporary password to Diana in an encrypted format.

TimeEntry.Title: Profile creation
TimeEntry.Notes: Created a user profile in godaddy 365 for the user penny mcnenry

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Request for Tech Assistance
TimeEntry.Notes:
Yesterday logged into Preya's system looked into it but she did not have passwords so set meeting for today

and today at 3:30 pm called and Assisted Preya with login issues for info@simplysofoods.com
 and preya@simplysofoods.com
. While attempting to sign in, an “untrusted device” error was encountered. Verified that Jyoti also uses the shared mailbox and contacted her to obtain permission to access her system. Reviewed and updated the email authentication settings on Jyoti’s device and used the verification code she received to complete the sign-in process. Successfully logged Preya into her account and confirmed access was restored and working properly.

TimeEntry.Title: ALG-HQ-LPT-01,ALG-HQ-LPT-10 :Manually patch update (not autopatched by scheduled APD)
TimeEntry.Notes: I accessed the machines, downloaded the compatible packages provided by MyRMM, and deployed them successfully. The patches were also updated successfully in MyRMM after a subsequent scan.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: System login issue for Alicia-ALG-HQ-LPT-10
TimeEntry.Notes: Received the call from the user & helped user to log in into the system.

TimeEntry.Title: Email storage
TimeEntry.Notes: User Najmeh had issue with storage, checked the my exchange. User has only 8gb left in archive folder,

TimeEntry.Title: Email storage
TimeEntry.Notes: reahced go daddy support regarding the options to get extra storage. Recommended the user the solutions and the cost for upgrade (50gb to 100gb)

TimeEntry.Title: Re: URGENT call needed: Multiple emails hacked
TimeEntry.Notes: As per the scheduled session with Smita, the machine was showing as offline in our remote access tool. Access was obtained through ManageEngine instead. We attempted to reinstall the ScreenConnect agent; however, this requires a system restart. In the meantime, a scan was initiated on the machine using Windows Defender, and CrowdStrike and Huntress scans were also triggered from their respective portals. The scans are currently in progress. A detailed handover has been provided to the next shift for continued monitoring and follow-up.

TimeEntry.Title: Re: URGENT call needed: Multiple emails hacked
TimeEntry.Notes: Windows Defender, and CrowdStrike and Huntress scans were also triggered from their respective portals. after completion of scan found no alerts and reboot the machine. Now it is healthy

TimeEntry.Title: Email migrationg from Godaddy
TimeEntry.Notes: Called GoDaddy as per schedule and try to initiate the migration process. Due to the heavy call at their end, they were unable to schedule the migration today. Update client over email about the new schedule.

TimeEntry.Title: Foxit PDFS
TimeEntry.Notes: Got an email from Veronica regarding a Foxit PDF Editor issue. Connected to the system remotely to troubleshoot the problem and identified that the error occurred because the installed Foxit version did not match the licensed edition. Explained the issue to the user and performed the recommended steps, including confirming the correct license type, fully uninstalling the existing Foxit version, rebooting the system, and removing any remaining Foxit folders. Then downloaded and installed the correct Foxit PDF Editor version from the Foxit portal using the licensed email and completed the activation. After installation, verified that Foxit was working correctly and confirmed the issue was resolved.

TimeEntry.Title: FW: CookUnity Vendor Onboarding Form
TimeEntry.Notes: Got an email from Patricia regarding blocking a suspicious email sender. Logged into the GoDaddy Admin portal and created a block policy for the phishing email by blocking the entire suspicious sender domain. After implementing the block, sent a confirmation email to the user. The issue was resolved successfully, and the ticket was closed.

TimeEntry.Title: Diana D Laptop issue
TimeEntry.Notes: I received an email from Diana regarding her laptop issue. She reported that her usual webpages were opening unrelated, random websites, so I connected to her laptop to investigate the issue. After checking, I found no cause for this problem. I then addressed her inquiry about email delivery failures. To troubleshoot, I logged into the GoDaddy Exchange admin portal and traced the email logs. I found that both emails had been successfully delivered. I then informed Diana of the findings via email, assuring her that the emails were delivered without any issues.

TimeEntry.Title: Fw: Fw:Invoice 2042-4398 for Diana Trujillo's VIP Membership is Due.
TimeEntry.Notes: Got an email from Diana Trujillo regarding blocking a suspicious email sender. Logged into the GoDaddy Admin portal and created a block policy for the phishing email by blocking the entire suspicious sender domain. After implementing the block, sent a confirmation email to the user. The issue was resolved successfully, and the ticket was closed.

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Invoice #66131 Remittance Update
TimeEntry.Notes: Received the mail from Dianna to check whether the email sender was spam. So it was spam email, so created the rule in exchange admin center to block the spam email sender.

TimeEntry.Title: ALG-HQ-LPT-08 : Manual patch update which APD failed to do
TimeEntry.Notes: I accessed the machines and successfully applied the patches. A few patches remain pending due to a required system reboot and files being in use by users. Only .NET and Logitech patches were visible in the MyRMM portal.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: RE: Not printing
TimeEntry.Notes: s per the email received, reviewed the error screenshots shared by the user. Verified the issue and sent the required steps/process to the user to check and perform the troubleshooting from their end.

TimeEntry.Title: Informational-severity alert: Creation of forwarding/redirect rule
TimeEntry.Notes:
The informational alert for MailRedirect activity was triggered for the user najmeh@algrointernational.com This alert indicates that a forwarding or redirect rule was created for the user's email,

Reviewed the Exchange Admin Center and found no active forwarding or redirect rules for the user. Additionally, we checked the mail flow rules but did not identify any suspicious configurations.

I also reviewed the user's mailbox settings for any visible forwarding rules but found nothing out of the ordinary. The alert was likely triggered by a change to the user's mailbox settings, which may have been authorized by the user or an admin.

I also reviewed the alert details and activity logs. The screenshot showed that the MailRedirect activity was recorded and linked to the creation of the forwarding rule. However, no further details were found within the logs that suggest unauthorized activity.

TimeEntry.Title: Cisco Umbrella synchronization Issue with the system.
TimeEntry.Notes:
Logged into the Cisco Umbrella portal to verify that all systems for ALG are properly synchronized and listed as expected.

Verified the synchronization status of the systems and deleted the old system and rescanned the services. 

Also, checked that the latest version of the Cisco Umbrella Secure Client is installed on all systems.
